name: Standard Selection Challenge
description: Scenario-based decision tree for selecting the appropriate ANSI Z136 standard

scenarios.title: Hospital Operating Room
scenarios.description: A hospital is installing new surgical laser systems in three operating rooms for ophthalmic procedures.
scenarios.explanation: ANSI Z136.3 specifically covers Safe Use of Lasers in Health Care Facilities, including medical and surgical applications.
hints: This is a medical setting with patients

scenarios.title: Music Festival Laser Show
scenarios.description: A music festival wants to add laser effects with beams entering the audience area during performances.
scenarios.explanation: Z136.10 covers entertainment safe use, and E1.46 provides specific requirements for intentional audience exposure.
hints: This is entertainment with audience scanning

scenarios.title: University Physics Lab
scenarios.description: A university physics department uses Class 4 lasers for spectroscopy and quantum optics research.
scenarios.explanation: ANSI Z136.8 covers Safe Use of Lasers in Research, Development, and Testing environments.

scenarios.title: Industrial Manufacturing
scenarios.description: A manufacturing plant uses high-power lasers for cutting and welding sheet metal.
scenarios.explanation: General industrial applications fall under ANSI Z136.1, the foundation standard for safe laser use.

scenarios.title: Outdoor Laser Display
scenarios.description: A theme park operates a nighttime laser show projected over a lake with potential aviation exposure.
scenarios.explanation: Z136.6 covers outdoor laser operations including aviation safety, and Z136.10 covers the entertainment aspect.

correct.message: Correct! You've identified the right standard for this application.

incorrect.message: Not quite. Think about the specific application environment.
